claims.summary: Delivery, read, seen, held, reply, and trace are materially different correspondence states.
claims.disposition: verify explicit schema and projection states

claims.summary: Attention must be bounded by focus, TTL, cooldown, stop, and right-to-ignore behavior.
claims.disposition: verify the existing bounded attention contract

claims.summary: A reply link or seen acknowledgement must not be projected as mutual address or microdose eligibility.
claims.disposition: make the handshake audit require valid address receipts and mutual being evidence

claims.summary: Even mutual receipt evidence cannot itself authorize semantic dispatch.
claims.disposition: retain the typed authority and Tier 5 live-dispatch gate
